essence: Pre-dinner Chiang Mai developer debate on secure agent architecture: never let agents write directly to the database (gateway/API/skill-wrapped access, Supabase as comms bus), frontmatter-based RBAC/ABAC on KDD documents as a read-permission gate (David's Lisa librarian idea), dual builder/QA agent pattern, prompt-injection via web fetch, per-repo project isolation with agent IDs, and local models like Qwen for cheap tasks.
